title: Jewelry Armor - Classic
description: Jewelry Armor is a resource pack that transforms Minecraft armor into elegant jewelry-inspired equipment while preserving the game's vanilla appearance.
body:
![JAFL2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63a1c79028eed518066ba7314dab1966b2533159.png)

**Unlike most armor packs, Jewelry Armor is not designed to cover the player completely. Its purpose is to complement the character with decorative elements while keeping both the armor and the skin recognizable.**

**Classic is the primary and most complete implementation of the Jewelry Armor concept. Every armor set receives carefully designed ornaments that blend naturally into Minecraft's original visual style.**

**Features:
• Vanilla-friendly 16×16 style
• Broad version compatibility
• Fully redesigned armor trims
• Every trim pattern is manually integrated into the jewelry system
• Suitable for Survival, PvP and Roleplay
• Preserves the identity of vanilla armor sets**

**Jewelry Armor Classic delivers a balance between decoration, readability and vanilla aesthetics.**

_The Jewelry Armor - Classic Team_
